contact@hive.com

Services

At Hive, we focus on building strong visual identities that make brands instantly recognizable. From the first sketch to a full identity system, we design logos and brand assets that are simple, memorable, and built to last.

View

Brand Identity

Complete identity systems including color palettes, typography, and usage rules to ensure consistency everywhere your brand appears.

Identity SystemsColor PalettesStyle Guides
View

Icon Design

Tailored icons and supporting marks that strengthen recognition and add flexibility to your brand system.

Custom IconsApp Symbols
View

Logo Design

Custom logos, wordmarks, and symbols designed to reflect your brand's story and values with clarity and impact.

Logo MarksWordmarksTypographySymbols
View

Rebranding

Modernizing outdated logos and refreshing visual identities so brands can stay relevant without losing their essence.

Brand RefreshStrategyModernizationGrowth

Our process

Discovery

We start by understanding your business, audience, and goals. This foundation ensures every design decision connects to your story.

Research & Strategy

We explore your industry, competitors, and trends to define a creative direction that sets your brand apart.

Concept Design

Our team creates multiple design directions — from logos to icon systems — each shaped to fit your needs and brand personality.

Refinement

We collaborate with you to refine the chosen concept, polishing details like color, typography, and balance until it's perfect.

Delivery

You receive all final assets — logos, icons, guidelines, or identity kits — packaged in professional formats ready for web, print, and beyond.

Testimonials

Hive gave us a logo that feels bold and confident. It's simple, memorable, and works perfectly across all our platforms

Robert Evans

Founder of BankPro

Hive took our rough ideas and turned them into a clean, timeless logo. The process was smooth, and the result is something we're proud to put everywhere.

Anna Peterson

Founder of Nextdock

The team really listened to our story and captured it perfectly in the design. Our new identity feels professional and has already impressed our clients

David Kim

Director at Scalar

We needed a rebrand that felt fresh but stayed true to our roots. Hive delivered exactly that — modern, simple, and versatile

Sofia Martinez

Marketing Lead at Neobase

Professional, fast, and creative. The new logo has already made a difference in how our customers see our brand
